name: dotnet

options.name: --version
options.description: Prints out the version of the .NET SDK used by dotnet commands. Includes the effects of any global.json

options.name: --info
options.description: Prints out detailed information about a .NET installation and the machine environment, such as the current operating system, and commit SHA of the .NET version

options.name: --list-runtimes
options.description: Prints out a list of the installed .NET runtimes. An x86 version of the SDK lists only x86 runtimes, and an x64 version of the SDK lists only x64 runtimes

options.name: --list-sdks
options.description: Prints out a list of the installed .NET SDKs

name: -h
--help
options.description: Prints out a list of available commands

name: -v
--verbosity
options.description: Sets the verbosity level of the command. Allowed values are q[uiet], m[inimal], n[ormal], d[etailed], and diag[nostic]. Not supported in every command. See specific command page to determine if this option is available

options.name: --additionalprobingpath
options.description: Path containing probing policy and assemblies to probe

options.name: --additional-deps
options.description: Path to an additional .deps.json file. A deps.json file contains a list of dependencies, compilation dependencies, and version information used to address assembly conflicts. For more information, see Runtime Configuration Files on GitHub

options.name: -depsfile
options.description: Path to the deps.json file. A deps.json file is a configuration file that contains information about dependencies necessary to run the application. This file is generated by the .NET SDK

options.name: --runtimeconfig
options.description: Path to a runtimeconfig.json file. A runtimeconfig.json file is a configuration file that contains run-time settings

options.name: --roll-forward
options.description: Controls how roll forward is applied to the app. The SETTING can be one of the following values. If not specified, Minor is the default

options.name: --fx-version
options.description: Version of the .NET runtime to use to run the application
